name: business
description: Per-project business-planning pipeline for the ~/dev portfolio: turn a shippable project into a commercial decision and keep it tracked. assess runs a viability triage (repo + vault + MATURITY.md context, a questions-first interview that confirms inferred audience/substitutes/willingness-to-pay rather than assuming them, opt-in --research that reuses any fresh market-research.md or dispatches the cited market-researcher subagent at triage depth) and writes a schema-versioned business/BUSINESS.md with a verdict (monetize | free-for-reputation | internal-only | park), target audience, and evidence tag; revenue-model turns an assess-passed verdict into a monetization decision (model, pricing hypothesis, channels, numeric dated targets) one choice at a time; market-research runs a standalone cited pass at an operator-selected depth tier (brief | standard | deep) — competitors, pricing, TAM/SAM/SOM sizing, trends, positioning gaps, channel norms, demand, plus a per-competitor marketing teardown (campaigns cited to ad-transparency libraries, detected tooling, messaging) and customer personas at standard/deep — persisted to a schema-2 business/market-research.md for assess and business-plan to reuse; business-plan composes the verdict, monetization, market research, gtm, and metrics plus a questions-first gap interview into a tiered twelve-section schema-2 business/plan.md (executive summary, problem & solution, customer personas, market analysis, competitive landscape, SWOT & positioning, product & roadmap, marketing & sales, operations, financial scenarios, risks, milestones), reusing research only at effective depth standard+ and offering missing prerequisites instead of fabricating them; launch produces a go-to-market plan at business/gtm-plan.md in the house checklist format (portfolio-unify-parseable so its progress rolls up like any plan), guarded by the project's MATURITY.md state so it warns before planning a launch for something far from ship-ready; track records actuals into an append-only business/metrics.md (free GitHub metrics auto-collected via collect-github.py, revenue/installs and an optional marketing funnel entered manually), diffs them against targets, and bumps the Last reviewed stamp; biz-portfolio sweeps every registry project via the deterministic business-scan.py evidence lane (the SOLE parser of the business artifacts — BUSINESS.md, market-research.md, plan.md, gtm-plan.md, metrics.md, with per-artifact schema ceilings and depth validation — one JSON contract, reusing portfolio-unify's plan-parser regexes for gtm progress) and rebuilds the global-business.md roll-up, flagging research/plans older than 90 days as STALE. A determinism boundary keeps all parsing in business-scan.py so the planning plugin's portfolio and compass skills consume its JSON additively (including research/plan staleness) and degrade loudly when the business plugin is absent.
